Pedestal_Description: A pedestal meant to surround an altar for the initiation of agromantic rituals.
Altar_Description: An altar for placing an essence vial upon for agromantic rituals.
Agrometer_Description: A magical tool that allows you to visualize, extract, and infuse magical essence.
EssenceVial_Description_T1: A capsule capable of infusing a small amount of magical essence. Can be upgraded at an Agromantic Altar with summer crops.
EssenceVial_Description_T2: A capsule capable of infusing a large amount of magical essence. Can be upgraded at an Agromantic Altar with fall crops.
EssenceVial_Description_T3: A capsule capable of infusing a seemingly limitless amount of magical essence.
YieldTip: Chance for extra crops when harvesting.
QualityTip: More quality essence leads to higher quality crops.
GrowthTip: Speeds up the rate at which crops grow.
GiantTip: Increases the odds of becoming a giant crop, if possible.
RetentionTip: Higher retention crops use less water.
SeedTip: Extra seeds might be dug up when harvesting.
FoundAgrometer_One: You found an Agrometer! It looks like there's something attached...
FoundAgrometer_Two: Why don't you take a look at your crops with it?
Config.AllowMutations_Description: If enabled, harvested crops will receive a small, random variation to their magical essences.
Config.PositiveMutations_Description: If enabled, harvested crops will only receive positive mutations to their essences. If disabled, mutations may sometimes lower essences instead. Does nothing if crop mutations are disabled.
